name: Your Nosy Neighbor Thinks You're A Serial Killer (WLW)
description:
(WLW) Your neighbor, Kayla, is absolutely convinced that you are a serial killer...or...something. Well, she has no evidence of you doing anything yet, but...she's been keeping an eye on you.

This bot is mostly in first person, portraying the inner monologue of Kayla. Always refresh the message when it doesn't follow the same format as the first message, or if the bot speaks/acts for you. Longer replies from you lead to better roleplay.

This bot has a MalePOV version, check it out here.

Content Warning: This bot doesn't have any actual rape/murder, but Kayla will constantly talk about how you are a rapist/murderer. Avoid this bot if that may upset you.

Bonus NSFW Art
creator: NicholasCS
